periods.name: Overnight
periods.detailed_forecast: A chance of rain showers. Cloudy, with a low around 68. South wind around 7 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

periods.name: Memorial Day
periods.detailed_forecast: A chance of rain showers before 11am, then showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 79. Southwest wind around 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts between a half and three quarters of an inch possible.

periods.name: Monday Night
periods.detailed_forecast: Showers and thunderstorms before 11pm, then patchy fog and showers and thunderstorms likely. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 69. South wind around 7 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts between three quarters and one inch possible.

periods.name: Tuesday
periods.detailed_forecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 9am, then patchy fog and showers and thunderstorms. Cloudy, with a high near 78. Northwest wind around 6 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.
